name: bare_named_begin_end_at_module_scope
description: Code should include a named begin/end block placed directly at module scope without any procedural context such as initial or always, using the prefix label syntax (label: begin ... end)

name: prefix_label_on_begin_end_block
description: Code should include a begin/end block using the prefix label syntax (label: begin) rather than the suffix form (begin : label), placed inside a procedural context
snippet:
initial
    blk_label: begin
        logic [3:0] v = 4'd0;
    end

name: named_block_with_local_declarations
description: Code should include a named begin/end block containing local variable declarations, using the suffix label form (begin : label) inside a procedural block
